title: leucopremna mexicana
intro: Leucopremna mexicana, also known as 'Mexican lemongrass', is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Lamiaceae. Native to Mexico and Central America, it has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Leucopremna mexicana include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting immune function, among others. In herbal preparations, the plant's essential oil is often extracted and used in aromatherapy, while its leaves and stems can be used to make teas and infusions for medicinal purposes.
